mnemonics: CLI GUI CLI: Command Line is Input-focused, Graphical User Interface is visual
keyPoints: The primary interfaces are the Command-Line Interface (CLI) and the Graphical User Interface (GUI).
System calls provide a programming interface for applications to request services from the operating system kernel.
The shell is a command interpreter that acts as an interface between the user and the operating system, available in both CLI and GUI forms.
commonMistakes: Believing the GUI is the operating system itself, rather than just an interface program running on top of it.
Confusing a system call (a request to the kernel) with a regular function call within an application.
